transcript.text:
[A dish that calls for rice]
[Spicy stir-fried pork]
[But...]
[There's this one thief...]
Are you eating all of this?
[It's spicy pork thief!]
[She who leaves nothing behind]
[It was an easy task...]
[A very quiet street]
Hello everyone
I'm at Eulji-ro today
I was looking through the blog to see what I wanted to eat
And found a very hidden restaurant So I had to check it out
Way deep inside this alley
Eulji-ro is the best place in Seoul to find streets like this
Over here There's a placard

[Insung (Galbi Kkupdaegi)] [Seoul, Jung-gu]
Feels very old
[Found the entrance!]
[And up the stairs]
[Be careful if you're not good with directions]
Hello
I'm here to eat
[You can see its age with the interior]
This restaurant feels really old
The blog said their spicy stir-fried pork is really delicious
[With 35 years of tradition]
How many servings do I need?
Excuse me
[Yes?]
How many grams are in 1 serving?
We just eyeball it No scale

Just an estimate
-Are you eating alone? -Yes I am
-8 servings -What?!
You look like you can't even finish 1 serving
No, 8 servings, please
Who's going to eat all of that?
I eat a lot
But still That's way too much
There's no way
How can you eat 8 servings?
I will try
[Whatever]
You're eating all of this?
[Still can't believe it]
That came out really fast
1 bowl of rice too, please

Bean sprout soup is tasty
It seems like they just reheat it before serving
But spicy stir-fried pork is great that way
It smells really good
Great meat-to-fat ratio
This is that taste
Delicious
Not too strong
It's something your mom or grandma would make for you
When you have the leftovers the next day
It's even more flavorful It's like that
Just about right
The soybean paste all grandmothers make from home
Is it ssamjang?
It really feels like I'm at grandma's
With chives now

So good
I love the fat
I'm craving some soju now
This is a rice-thief
Another bowl of rice, please
-Another one? -Yes
When will you finish the meat then?
I love how it's just all meat on the plate
No vegetables Just meat
[Scary...]
[And he disappeared with the green onions...]
I feel like a lot of people will come here during their lunch breaks
Tasty
With white rice
Can I have more?
More rice?!

[She's very strange]
Thank you
I'll get you more soup
The soup is great too
It really goes well with the soup
I feel like there are so many great hidden restaurants here in Eulji-ro
I did that kimchi stew mukbang here
Also did the black bean noodles mukbang
And there's also a very famous North Korean cold noodle restaurant here
I want to try that place
And also this bulgogi (marinated beef) restaurant nearby
[Eulji-ro is the best...]
So many places you need to get in line for
Use this to mix the rice?
I'm going to mix it up here
The whole plate

Is this too much? Just half...
3 spins of sesame oil
The sesame oil smell is crazy good
It smells amazing
Delicious
Spicy stir-fried pork is a great topping for mixed rice
Thank you
I'm so jealous You eat so well
I thought you were lying at first
First time in 35 years seeing anything like this
[I'm just terrified...]
[A horror movie coming to a theater near you...]
Mukbang YouTubers are different...
Last one
Excuse me
More rice, please

[5 refills...]
Thank you
You set the highest record here
Really In 35 years of business
It tastes so good
It's been 35 years here
35 years of tradition
Doing too many years of restaurant-business results in sickness
I have a back disc, so I went through surgery
I used to work past 4am every day
We served about 200 customers on Fridays
The bean sprout soup is so good
I should've ordered 10 servings
1 last bite
Incredible
This needs to go on the Guinness Book of World Records

The food was really good
Would you like a cup of coffee?
I'd love that!
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
